data.name: UnexpectedServerError
data.value: Unexpected server error

data.name: UnexpectedErrorProcessingRequest
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: The request contains invalid values.

data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: ResourceConflict
data.value: The request conflicts with the current resource state.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationRequest
data.value: The organization request contains invalid values.

data.name: OrganizationContactEmailDuplicated
data.value: Organization contact email is already registered.

data.name: OrganizationTaxIdDuplicated
data.value: Organization tax identifier is already registered.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganization
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the organization.

data.name: InvalidOrganizationSignUpRequest
data.value: The organization sign-up request is invalid.

data.name: UserEmailDuplicated
data.value: User email is already registered.

data.name: InitialRoleNotFound
data.value: Initial sign-up role is missing.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingOrganizationSignUp
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while signing up the organization.

data.name: InvalidUserRequest
data.value: The user request is invalid.

data.name: OrganizationNotFound
data.value: Organization was not found.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: User was not found.

data.name: RoleNotFound
data.value: Role was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingUser
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the user.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAssigningUserRole
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while assigning the user role.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingUsers
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting users.

data.name: InvalidLocationRequest
data.value: The location request is invalid.

data.name: LocationNameDuplicated
data.value: Location name already exists in this organization.

data.name: LocationNotFound
data.value: Location was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingLocation
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingLocations
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting locations.

data.name: InvalidGatewayRequest
data.value: The gateway request is invalid.

data.name: GatewayUuidDuplicated
data.value: Gateway UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: GatewayNotFound
data.value: Gateway was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingGateway
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the gateway.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingGateways
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting gateways.

data.name: InvalidAssetRequest
data.value: The asset request is invalid.

data.name: AssetUuidDuplicated
data.value: Asset UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: AssetNotFound
data.value: Asset was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingAsset
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the asset.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingAsset
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the asset.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingAssets
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting assets.

data.name: InvalidIotDeviceRequest
data.value: The IoT device request is invalid.

data.name: IotDeviceUuidDuplicated
data.value: IoT device UUID already exists in this organization.

data.name: IotDeviceNotFound
data.value: IoT device was not found.

data.name: IotDeviceAssetLocationNotCompatible
data.value: The selected asset is not located at the same gateway location.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingIotDevice
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the IoT device.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorUpdatingIotDevice
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while updating the IoT device.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingIotDevices
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting IoT devices.

data.name: InvalidSensorReadingRequest
data.value: The sensor reading request is invalid.

data.name: SensorReadingNotFound
data.value: Sensor reading was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingSensorReading
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the sensor reading.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingSensorReading
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting the sensor reading.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingSensorReadings
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting sensor readings.

data.name: InvalidIncidentRequest
data.value: The incident request is invalid.

data.name: IncidentNotFound
data.value: Incident was not found.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyAcknowledged
data.value: Incident has already been acknowledged.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyResolved
data.value: Incident has already been resolved.

data.name: IncidentAlreadyEscalated
data.value: Incident has already been escalated.

data.name: InvalidIncidentLifecycleTransition
data.value: The incident lifecycle transition is not allowed.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorCreatingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while creating the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorAcknowledgingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while acknowledging the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorEscalatingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while escalating the incident.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorRegisteringIncidentCorrectiveAction
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while registering the incident corrective action.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorResolvingIncident
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while resolving the incident.

data.name: IncidentCannotReceiveAiResolutionPlan
data.value: Incident cannot receive AI resolution plans in its current status.

data.name: IncidentAiContextUnavailable
data.value: Incident context is incomplete or unavailable for AI resolution plan generation.

data.name: AiProviderUnavailable
data.value: AI provider is unavailable.

data.name: AiProviderDisabled
data.value: AI assistance is disabled.

data.name: AiProviderNotConfigured
data.value: AI provider is not configured.

data.name: AiProviderRequestFailed
data.value: AI provider request failed.

data.name: AiProviderTimeout
data.value: AI provider timed out.

data.name: AiProviderTimedOut
data.value: AI provider did not respond before the configured timeout.

data.name: InvalidAiStructuredOutput
data.value: Invalid AI structured output.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanInvalidStructuredOutput
data.value: AI provider returned an invalid resolution plan structure.

data.name: InvalidAiResolutionPlanApprovalRequest
data.value: The AI resolution plan approval request is invalid.

data.name: InvalidAiResolutionPlanRejectionRequest
data.value: The AI resolution plan rejection request is invalid.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanNotFound
data.value: The AI resolution plan was not found.

data.name: AiResolutionPlanAlreadyDecided
data.value: The AI resolution plan has already been approved or rejected.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the AI resolution plan.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorApprovingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while approving the AI resolution plan.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorRejectingAiResolutionPlan
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while rejecting the AI resolution plan.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingAiResolutionPlans
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting AI resolution plans.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingIncidents
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting incidents.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingNotifications
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting notifications.

data.name: InvalidReportRequest
data.value: The report request is invalid.

data.name: ReportNotFound
data.value: Report was not found.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGeneratingReport
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while generating the report.

data.name: UnexpectedErrorGettingReports
data.value: An unexpected error occurred while getting reports.
